title: Insert date or date/time stamp in update notes

posts.author: Janewhite2627 (Jane White)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m pretty familiar with Monday and have checked about this and can’t find anything related. I’m a recruiter and I use the update field constantly to put in new notes. I would like to start an update with a date or date/time stamp so I don’t have to type it in all day long. Does anyone know if this is possible?
